summary: Frontend testing completed for AdminPanel.js refactoring verification. All modular components (ExamsTab, SystemSettingsTab, WhatsAppSettingsTab) are properly integrated and functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All modular admin components are properly exported from /app/frontend/src/components/admin/index.js
ExamsTab.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing (add-exam-btn, exam-{id}, delete-exam-{id})
SystemSettingsTab.jsx has proper data-testid for reset-data-btn
WhatsAppSettingsTab.jsx has proper data-testid attributes (whatsapp-master-switch, test-number-input, send-test-btn)
AdminPanel.js correctly imports and uses all modular components
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminPanel refactoring verified. All 10 tabs (Branches, Programs, Users, Sessions, Expenses, Sources, Exams, WhatsApp, Webhooks, System) are working correctly. Modular components ExamsTab, SystemSettingsTab, and WhatsAppSettingsTab are properly integrated.
